entities.name: regex

entities.name: flags
entities.context: Parameters that modify the behavior of regex

entities.name: g
entities.context: A standard regex flag for global matching

entities.name: m
entities.context: A standard regex flag for multiline matching

entities.name: i
entities.context: A standard regex flag for case-insensitive matching

entities.name: y
entities.context: A standard regex flag for sticky matching

entities.name: u
entities.context: A standard regex flag for Unicode matching
